value.author: lane-b-subagent-20260614
value.text:
Lane B coverage implementation evidence:
- Refactored Lane-B unit tests to import package/runtime TypeScript sources directly (beads, todos, search-advanced, extension entrypoints, command-kit) and added deterministic cache-busting for dynamic imports.
- Added new focused suites: tests/unit/lane-b-package-runtime-coverage.spec.ts and tests/unit/lane-b-scripts-coverage.spec.ts to cover package runtime wrappers/loaders/indexes plus docs/examples and plugin scripts.

Verification command outcomes:
1) PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/lane-b-package-runtime-coverage.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b-scripts-coverage.spec.ts
   -> PASS (2 files, 14 tests).
2) PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts tests/unit/beads-command.spec.ts tests/unit/todos-extension.spec.ts tests/unit/search-advanced-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b-package-runtime-coverage.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b-scripts-coverage.spec.ts
   -> PASS (7 files, 155 tests).
3) PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage -- tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts tests/unit/beads-command.spec.ts tests/unit/todos-extension.spec.ts tests/unit/search-advanced-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b-package-runtime-coverage.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b-scripts-coverage.spec.ts --coverage.thresholds.lines=0 --coverage.thresholds.functions=0 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.statements=0
   -> PASS (7 files, 155 tests), coverage report generated.

Measured coverage movement for strict Lane-B families (from coverage/coverage-summary.json aggregate):
- packages/**/*.ts: lines 87.42% -> 94.22%, statements 87.59% -> 94.21%, functions 83.78% -> 92.27%, branches 79.69% -> 87.08%.
- plugins/**/*.mjs: lines 46.91% -> 88.89%, statements 45.65% -> 88.04%, functions 55.56% -> 100.00%, branches 34.00% -> 70.00%.
- docs/examples/**/*.js|mjs|ts: lines 90.83% -> 100.00%, statements 91.07% -> 100.00%, functions 100.00% -> 100.00%, branches 55.32% -> 69.15%.

Remaining non-100 files are concentrated in branch-heavy runtime/loader paths (e.g. calendar runtime, beads/todos runtime-loaders, guide-shell runtime, plugin mcp wrapper spawn/repo resolution branches).}

- Key target files (lines pct): calendar runtime 0.00 -> 88.88; governance runtime 0.00 -> 96.87; guide-shell runtime 0.00 -> 92.56; linked-test-adapters runtime 0.00 -> 96.87; templates runtime 0.00 -> 100.00; claude session-start 0.00 -> 100.00; claude pm-mcp-server 0.00 -> 89.28; codex pm-mcp-server 0.00 -> 82.14; sdk app embedding example 0.00 -> 100.00; sdk contract consumer example 0.00 -> 100.00; starter extension example 0.00 -> 94.02.

value.author: lane-b-wave2-subagent-20260614
value.text:
Wave-2 lane-B coverage evidence:
- Updated existing lane-b suites in tests/unit/lane-b to add deterministic branch coverage for docs examples, plugin session-start/MCP wrappers, and targeted package runtimes.
- Focused verification command 1: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/lane-b/package-runtime-wave2.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b/plugin-scripts-wave2.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b/docs-examples-wave2.spec.ts
  Result: PASS (3 files, 12 tests).
- Focused verification command 2: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage -- tests/unit/lane-b/package-runtime-wave2.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b/plugin-scripts-wave2.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b/docs-examples-wave2.spec.ts --coverage.thresholds.lines=0 --coverage.thresholds.functions=0 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.statements=0
  Result: PASS (3 files, 12 tests) with coverage report generated.
- Measured movement (baseline probe before edits -> final probe after edits):
  * docs/examples target set avg lines 98.50% -> 100.00%; avg branches 74.66% -> 85.53%.
  * plugin target set avg lines 90.47% -> 100.00%; avg branches 69.69% -> 89.17%.
  * targeted package runtime set avg lines 95.04% -> 98.92%; avg branches 84.07% -> 88.73%.
- Key per-file gains:
  * packages/pm-calendar/extensions/calendar/runtime.ts lines 88.88% -> 100.00%.
  * packages/pm-governance-audit/extensions/governance-audit/runtime.ts lines 96.87% -> 100.00%.
  * packages/pm-linked-test-adapters/extensions/linked-test-adapters/runtime.ts lines 96.87% -> 100.00%.
  * plugins/pm-claude/scripts/pm-mcp-server.mjs lines 89.28% -> 100.00%.
  * plugins/pm-codex/scripts/pm-mcp-server.mjs lines 82.14% -> 100.00%.
  * docs/examples/starter-extension/index.js lines 94.02% -> 100.00%.
- Remaining notable gap in this focused sweep: packages/pm-guide-shell/extensions/guide-shell/runtime.ts remains below full line coverage (94.59%), with uncov lines concentrated in runtime-completion edge paths.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Lane B wave3 (opus orchestration, 2026-06-15): sub-agent lane-b-agent-20260614-opus ran ~40min (116 tool calls), cut off by session-limit pre-documentation. Landed: new tests/unit/lane-b/runtime-loaders-wave3.spec.ts (beads/todos dynamic ESM runtime-loader success+failure branches) + extended beads-command, todos-extension, builtin-extension-entrypoints, search-advanced-runtime, extension-command specs. Orchestrator fixed one cut-off-left broken assertion in builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts:494 (calendar renderer returns null only for non-calendar result, not by command name).
